rich.text: While reviewing, I attempted to connect to an AWS EC2 instance but faced unexpected connection failures. Despite troubleshooting various aspects, the issue persisted.
커넥션 에러가 발생하였는데, 해결이 계속 안됐습니다.
The solution turned out to be surprisingly simple yet unexpected: changing from the public WiFi to my private network.
놀랍게도 그것은 제가 public wifi에 접속했기 때문이었습니다.
